divisions.title: Commendation
divisions.summary: Thanksgiving for their faith and perseverance, Paul's ministry among them, Timothy's encouraging report

divisions.title: Instruction
divisions.summary: Sexual purity, love for one another, the coming of the Lord, be watchful and sober, encourage one another

chapterSummaries.1: Faith, love, and hope, turned from idols to serve the living God
chapterSummaries.2: Paul's ministry among them, the gospel despite opposition
chapterSummaries.3: Timothy's encouraging report, prayer for their love to increase
chapterSummaries.4: Live to please God, the Lord's return, comfort one another
chapterSummaries.5: Day of the Lord comes like a thief, be watchful, encourage and build up
